prompt:
You are doing an adversarial code review. Be THOROUGH and SPECIFIC.

Review the changes on the current git branch (story-1-1: Add API Version Prefix to All Public Routes).

For each issue found, provide EXACTLY this format:

FINDING N:
  Severity: HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
  File: exact/path/to/file.swift
  Line: exact line number
  Issue: Precise description
  Suggested Fix: Specific fix

The changed files are:
- Sources/App/Modules/Auth/AuthRouter.swift
- Sources/App/Modules/RulesGeneration/RulesGenerationRouter.swift  
- Sources/App/Modules/User/UserRouter.swift
- Sources/App/Modules/Waitlist/WaitlistRouter.swift
- Sources/App/Middlewares/Security/RateLimit/RateLimitConfiguration.swift
- Tests/AppTests/Framework/Mocks/Services/MockRateLimitService.swift
- Tests/AppTests/Tests/ControllerTests/RulesGenerationTests/RulesGenerationRouteVersioningTests.swift
- Tests/AppTests/Tests/ControllerTests/AuthenticationTests/*.swift
- Tests/AppTests/Tests/ControllerTests/UserTests/*.swift

Focus on: code correctness, testing gaps, security issues, and architecture violations.

If you find no issues, respond with: "No issues found"
